ci_support_linux_64_python3.11.____cpyth:
c_compiler:
- gcc
c_compiler_version:
- '14'
c_stdlib:
- sysroot
c_stdlib_version:
- '2.17'
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
cxx_compiler:
- gxx
cxx_compiler_version:
- '14'
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
numpy:
- '2'
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.11.* *_cpython
rust_compiler:
- rust
target_platform:
- linux-64
zip_keys:
- - c_compiler_version
  - cxx_compiler_version
name: river
raw_meta_yaml:
schema_version: 1

context:
  name: river
  version: "0.24.2"

package:
  name: ${{ name|lower }}
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/${{ name[0] }}/${{ name }}/river-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: f4e99546f27c411920c4afaf87d50676e3772b3a718f385f8ab7287384658df0

build:
  number: 1
  skip:
    - match(python, "<3.11")
  script:
    - cargo-bundle-licenses --format yaml --output THIRDPARTY.yml
    - ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv

requirements:
  build:
    - if: build_platform != target_platform
      then:
        - python
        - cross-python_${{ target_platform }}
        - numpy
        - cython
    - cargo-bundle-licenses
    - ${{ compiler('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('cxx') }}
    - ${{ stdlib('c') }}
    - ${{ compiler('rust') }}
  host:
    - python
    - poetry-core
    - setuptools
    - setuptools-rust
    - numpy
    - cython
    - pip
  run:
    - python
    - scipy >=1.16,<2
    - pandas >=2.2.3,<3
    - numpy >=2.3.4,<3
    - altair >=5.0.0

tests:
  - python:
      pip_check: true
      imports:
        - river
        - river.active
        - river.anomaly
        - river.bandit
        - river.base
        - river.checks
        - river.cluster
        - river.compat
        - river.compose
        - river.covariance
        - river.datasets
        - river.datasets.synth
        - river.drift
        - river.ensemble
        - river.evaluate
        - river.facto
        - river.feature_extraction
        - river.feature_selection
        - river.imblearn
        - river.linear_model
        - river.metrics
        - river.metrics.multioutput
        - river.misc
        - river.model_selection
        - river.multiclass
        - river.multioutput
        - river.naive_bayes
        - river.neighbors
        - river.neural_net
        - river.optim
        - river.preprocessing
        - river.proba
        - river.reco
        - river.rules
        - river.sketch
        - river.stats
        - river.stream
        - river.time_series
        - river.tree
        - river.tree.nodes
        - river.tree.split_criterion
        - river.tree.splitter
        - river.utils

about:
  summary: Online machine learning in Python
  license: BSD-3-Clause
  license_file:
    - THIRDPARTY.yml
    - LICENSE
  homepage: https://github.com/online-ml/river

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - mxr-conda
    - bubblyorca
    - synapticarbors
